reviews.comment:
Fui anoche y me trataron muy mal. Necesitaba usar el baño y no me lo permitieron. Sumado que tengo un problema de salud que requiere que vaya l baño. Un horror

(Translated by Google)
I went last night and they treated me terribly. I needed to use the restroom and they wouldn't let me. Plus, I have a health condition that requires me to use the restroom. It was awful.
